subcodes.first_line: As for the matter of your daughter, if she is known and recognized among the people as a follower of the Jewish Faith, you must implement the laws of the Torah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اما قضیه صبیه شما اگر در میان خلق به کلیمی مشهورو معروفند شریعت تورات مجری دارید
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @personal instructions
